data.name: Project: Mirror
data.detailed_description:
PROJECT: STELLAR GIRLS


Elf World Adventure


關於此遊戲

Welcome to Project: MIRROR!




Trading cards, emoji, badges and backgrounds are already available!






Tired after a hard day at work? Then Project: MIRROR! is all you need. In a world full of magic and fantastic creatures, the souls of beautiful girls are shattered into several pieces during a violent and powerful storm. You, as one of the survivors of this disaster, are the only one who can help the beauties revive their souls.





Gameplay:


Project: MIRROR! is a fascinating puzzle game about making combinations of multiple crystals! 100 vibrant levels with hot girls and a variety of visual, sound effects await you.

  • In this game you have to correctly pick up the same crystals in a row so that they disappear. Your goal is to score points and unlock new levels.
  • After you pass several levels, you will have beautiful girls available in the gallery Collect the necessary number of points and conquer one level after another with beautiful and amazing girls.

With each new level, collecting souls and smashing crystals will become more and more interesting! Enjoy a fun game and beautiful, hot girls at the same time! Lots of cool levels with great effects are waiting for you! You'll be hooked on this game!





Game features:


  • Incredible visuals
  • Complete levels and get stars
  • Unlock and collect images
  • Get 100 achievements
  • Relax to the music during the game
  • You can skip any level with one tap
  • Enjoy your day with cute girls!

data.short_description: Project: MIRROR! is a world full of magic, there souls of beautiful girls have broken into several pieces during a violent and powerful storm. You are the only one who can help the beauties revive their souls!
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
